name: natural-prompt-scenario-cases
description: Larger prompt-pair suite grouped by common user situations and business-style document questions.

cases.situation: A new user asks what the assistant can do.
cases.perfect_prompt: Explain briefly what I can use Local AI OS for in this installed workspace.
cases.human_prompt: what can you help me with here?

cases.situation: A user wants to know how document knowledge works.
cases.perfect_prompt: Explain how uploaded documents are used in chat answers.
cases.human_prompt: how do you use my files when i ask stuff?

cases.situation: A user asks about a safety setting.
cases.perfect_prompt: What does safe mode do in Local AI OS?
cases.human_prompt: what does safe mode actually do?

cases.situation: A user asks about accounts and sign-in.
cases.perfect_prompt: Explain the difference between admin and viewer accounts in this app.
cases.human_prompt: what's the deal with admin and viewer accounts?

cases.situation: A user asks what was uploaded last.
cases.perfect_prompt: Which document was uploaded most recently? Return the exact file name.
cases.human_prompt: what did i upload last?

cases.situation: A user asks what the newest file is about.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the most recently uploaded document and mention its file name.
cases.human_prompt: what's the latest doc about?

cases.situation: A user asks what files exist.
cases.perfect_prompt: List the uploaded documents by type and mention useful files for business questions.
cases.human_prompt: what kinda files have i uploaded?

cases.situation: A user searches for a topic without naming a file.
cases.perfect_prompt: Find documents related to "{topic}" and explain briefly what the relevant document says.
cases.human_prompt: do we have anything about {topic}?

cases.situation: A user asks for reports in plain language.
cases.perfect_prompt: Find a report document and summarize what it reports.
cases.human_prompt: do we have any reports?

cases.situation: A user asks what a named document is about.
cases.perfect_prompt: In the document named "{document_name}", what is it mainly about? Include concrete details.
cases.human_prompt: what is {short_name} about?

cases.situation: A user wants a very short summary.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize "{document_name}" in one clear sentence.
cases.human_prompt: give me the short version of {short_name}

cases.situation: A user asks what matters in a document.
cases.perfect_prompt: Extract the most important dates, numbers, people, organizations, or codes from "{document_name}".
cases.human_prompt: anything important i should notice in {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user wants a business-oriented summary.
cases.perfect_prompt: Prepare a business-friendly summary of "{document_name}" with purpose, key facts, and possible follow-up questions.
cases.human_prompt: can you give me the useful business summary of {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user wants suggested follow-up questions.
cases.perfect_prompt: Based on "{document_name}", suggest useful follow-up questions a business user should ask.
cases.human_prompt: what should i ask next about {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for the title.
cases.perfect_prompt: What title appears in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: what's the title of {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks about organizations or companies.
cases.perfect_prompt: Which companies or organizations are mentioned in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: who is mentioned in {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for actions or recommendations.
cases.perfect_prompt: What actions, recommendations, or next steps appear in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: is there anything i need to do from {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for dates and deadlines.
cases.perfect_prompt: What deadlines, dates, or durations are mentioned in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: any dates i should care about in {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for risks.
cases.perfect_prompt: What risks or issues are mentioned in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: anything risky in {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks about a scanned document.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the scanned or OCR-read document "{document_name}".
cases.human_prompt: can you read the scanned PDF {document_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for important extracted OCR details.
cases.perfect_prompt: What key codes, dates, numbers, or incidents appear in the OCR-read document "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: what important bits can you pull from the scanned PDF {document_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks for similar documents.
cases.perfect_prompt: Find documents that are most similar to "{document_name}" and explain why.
cases.human_prompt: got anything kinda like {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user asks if two documents are basically the same.
cases.perfect_prompt: Compare "{document_name}" with "{other_document_name}". Explain what is similar and what is different.
cases.human_prompt: are {short_name} and {other_short_name} basically the same or different?

cases.situation: A user asks what changed between related documents.
cases.perfect_prompt: What changed between "{document_name}" and "{other_document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: what changed between {short_name} and {other_short_name}?

cases.situation: A user reviews a policy.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the policy document "{document_name}" and list what a business user should follow.
cases.human_prompt: what does the policy say i should do?

cases.situation: A user reviews invoice or finance data.
cases.perfect_prompt: What amount, invoice number, or financial value is mentioned in "{document_name}"?
cases.human_prompt: what money info is in {short_name}?

cases.situation: A user reviews an agreement or contract.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the agreement or contract "{document_name}" and highlight obligations or terms.
cases.human_prompt: what should i know from this contract?

cases.situation: A user asks about an incident report.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the incident report "{document_name}" with incident, impact, and recommendation.
cases.human_prompt: what happened in the incident report?

cases.situation: A user asks about a presentation.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the presentation "{document_name}" and mention the main milestone or rollout topic.
cases.human_prompt: what's this deck about?

cases.situation: A user asks about a code/config file.
cases.perfect_prompt: Explain what the code file "{document_name}" does and mention important functions.
cases.human_prompt: what does this code file do?

cases.situation: A user asks about spreadsheet values.
cases.perfect_prompt: Summarize the spreadsheet "{document_name}" and mention important totals or values.
cases.human_prompt: what numbers matter in the spreadsheet?

cases.situation: A user follows up with 'that one'.
cases.perfect_prompt: After identifying "{document_name}", explain what that document is about.
cases.human_prompt: and what was that one about?

cases.situation: A user asks for actions from the previously mentioned file.
cases.perfect_prompt: After identifying "{document_name}", list any actions or next steps in it.
cases.human_prompt: anything i need to do from it?

cases.situation: A user asks for risks from the current context.
cases.perfect_prompt: After identifying "{document_name}", list any risks or issues in it.
cases.human_prompt: any risks in that?
